overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning with a character walking through wet neon-lit streets, ascending a red staircase between buildings, and transitioning to a vehicle driving sequence following a black and gold sedan through intersections with holographic traffic signals. The environment features towering glass structures, vibrant neon signage, and reflective wet asphalt.

events.description: character turns left at street corner, revealing 24/7 store signage
approaching red staircase entrance between commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: third-person character walking steadily through wet city streets, navigating around planters and street furniture

pedestrian in blue hat and white top walking ahead toward staircase

cyan neon sign reading BELOW mounted on building facade

bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet red pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic commercial district with wet reflective streets. Neon signs illuminate the glass arcade building ahead, while the character passes concrete planters and turns toward a staircase entrance. Sparse pedestrians share the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase between high-rise commercial buildings

events.description: character begins ascending red concrete stairs between building walls
reaching top of stairs, view opens to upper street level with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: character running up steep red concrete stairs, passing descending pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink outfit descending the stairs
pedestrian with colorful purple umbrella and orange belt descending stairs

entered.detail: steep wide staircase with red painted steps and concrete sides
smooth concrete wall with green tinted lighting at base
dark red metal wall with graffiti and posters
large yellow illuminated billboard with black graphics at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep red staircase squeezed between towering buildings, passing pedestrians coming down. The environment shifts from open street to enclosed stairwell with artificial lighting, emerging at the top to a view of massive vertical billboards and skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane futuristic intersection with holographic traffic control

events.description: perspective switches to third-person vehicle view following black sedan
ground crosswalk signals change from red WAIT to green WALK arrows
vehicle accelerates through intersection, passing red sports car

agents.ego_description: camera follows a black and gold sedan navigating through city traffic and intersections

notable_agents.action: black and gold Thorton sedan with reflective paint driving forward through multiple intersections
red sports car driving parallel through the intersection

entered.detail: illuminated yellow and green signals embedded in road surface indicating WALK and WAIT
tall cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements and neon accents
massive cylindrical industrial tower dominating the skyline in the distance
raised highway or monorail track curving through the cityscape
large circular advertising structure with glowing blue and red holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vehicle perspective following a black and gold sedan through wide futuristic intersections. Holographic billboards and ground-embedded traffic signals illuminate the wet asphalt as the car navigates past other vehicles, with a massive industrial tower visible in the distant haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a pedestrian's perspective in a neon-lit commercial district to a high-speed vehicle chase through a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins with a walk along wet, reflective streets past glass arcade buildings and concrete planters, moving steadily toward a narrow staircase entrance. As the camera ascends the steep red stairs squeezed between towering structures, the open street gives way to an enclosed stairwell before emerging at the top to reveal a skyline of massive vertical billboards. The scene then shifts seamlessly to a vehicle perspective, following a black and gold sedan through wide intersections where holographic signals illuminate the damp asphalt. Finally, the camera glides past other cars through the urban haze, keeping the sedan in view as a massive industrial tower looms in the distance.
